summary: Beloved spring‑1988 show captured in an UltraMatrix mix that fans rate as a top‑tier recording
review: The reviewer calls this performance one of their all‑time favorites and praises the spring‑1988 era as "the bomb," indicating strong enthusiasm for both the music and the overall listening experience. No specific technical details are given, but the UltraMatrix source suggests a high‑quality matrix mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one enthusiastic 5‑star review; positive sentiment about the show but no concrete recording details, so rating leans high but confidence is limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound quality; UltraMatrix designation implies a blended soundboard/audience mix that is generally well‑regarded.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer expresses overall love for the concert without noting any issues in pacing or set structure.
